title: CobbleCafe Oficial
description: Cobblemon Server with high custom experience
body:
Official Modpack for CobbleCafé, a cobblemon spanish server. This modpack includes a bunch of mods that allows you to play on our server..

You will find on this modpack:
Cobblemon Mod, TMs, extra features for cobblemon, a mod to ride pokemons, megaevolutions, Radical Cobblemon Trainers, some cobblemon dependencies and even a pokemon navegator! Also Shaders and other performance mods.
